title: Music Generation System
description: Designed a multi-model music generation system using TensorFlow and Keras, with separate models for each genre, supporting both single and multi-instrument compositions.
Integrated it with a Flutter app via a Flask API, enabling user authentication and custom music creation.

title: Weapon Detection System
description: Built a real-time weapon detection system using Python, OpenCV, and a custom-trained YOLO model, deployed as a Tkinter application installable on multiple devices.
Integrated it with a Django server to send real-time alerts, enabling security centers or law enforcement to receive location data and detected images.
